# Register a backport patch with two resolves entries and a note.
# Pedigree is created from scratch since the initial component
# has none.
manifest
patch
pkg:generic/acme/libx@1.0
./patches/fix-cve-2024-1.patch
--type
backport
--resolves
type=security,name=CVE-2024-1,url=https://example.com/cve/2024-1
--resolves
type=defect,name=BUG-42
--notes
Backported to fix CVE-2024-1 and BUG-42
